sections.title: Without an Amulet of ghostspeak or Morytania legs 2 or higher equipped

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Who are you?

lines.speaker: Archpriest of the Unicorn
lines.text: Woo wooo?

sections.title: With an Amulet of ghostspeak or Morytania legs 2 or higher equipped

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Who are you?

lines.speaker: Archpriest of the Unicorn
lines.text: Me? I am the Archpriest who was responsible for the running of this place! I am impressed that you managed to reach my resting place on the lowest level.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Well it wasn't easy for sure. You wouldn't believe how difficult it was to overcome some of those traps.

lines.speaker: Archpriest of the Unicorn
lines.text: The intention was that they should've been impossible to pass. I should know. After all, it was I who was responsible for overseeing the safeguarding of this place.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Why did you need the safeguards? Surely they made it more difficult to do your work down here?

lines.speaker: Archpriest of the Unicorn
lines.text: I'm not sure if I should say... I wouldn't want to compromise the trust that the Justiciar of the Unicorn has in me. Afterall, we did what we did for the safety of Hallowvale.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: So... about that. Hallowvale no longer exists. The Hallowed Sepulchre is now beneath the vampyre capital of Darkmeyer within the lands of Morytania.

lines.speaker: Archpriest of the Unicorn
lines.text: I see... So we lost then? In that case, I suppose it doesn't hurt to tell you after all.

lines.speaker: Archpriest of the Unicorn
lines.text: One day the justiciar sent word to me that I should begin work on securing the Sepulchre. He feared an invasion from the followers of the Dark Lord.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Do you mean Zamorak?

lines.speaker: Archpriest of the Unicorn
lines.text: Yes, I do. The justiciar said he was going to confront these forces but that I should stay to protect the secrets within this place. I wish I could have joined him on the battlefield. I carried out my duties though.

lines.speaker: Archpriest of the Unicorn
lines.text: I never told the others what was really happening. Day by day we worked our way down to the final floor.

lines.speaker: Archpriest of the Unicorn
lines.text: As we progressed further, we became more experienced at creating the traps. Each one was more deadly than the last.

lines.speaker: Archpriest of the Unicorn
lines.text: Eventually, when our work was done, I performed the last rites for each of my followers and sealed them within the coffins on the final floor.

lines.speaker: Archpriest of the Unicorn
lines.text: Finally, I did the same for myself. The knowledge of how to disarm the traps died with us.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: You buried yourselves alive? That's... horrible!

lines.speaker: Archpriest of the Unicorn
lines.text: No, I think at that point most of us were already dead. We died knowing that we sacrificed ourselves for the good of holy Saradomin and the justiciars who follow him.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Well, at the very least you succeeded at keeping the vampyres out of the Sepulchre. From what I have seen, none of them have been able to enter.

lines.speaker: Archpriest of the Unicorn
lines.text: I am glad adventurer. Perhaps that information will allow my spirit to pass on peacefully soon.

sections.title: Upon opening the Grand Hallowed Coffin in the Hallowed Sepulchre
Without an Amulet of ghostspeak or Morytania legs 2 or higher equipped

lines.speaker: Archpriest of the Unicorn
lines.text: Woo? Woo wooooooooo!

sections.title: With an Amulet of ghostspeak or Morytania legs 2 or higher equipped

lines.speaker: Archpriest of the Unicorn
lines.text: What are you doing in my coffin? Leave this holy place at once!

sections.title: Upon using a ring of endurance on the Archpriest

lines.speaker: Archpriest of the Unicorn
lines.text: That... That's my ring! I thought I destroyed it!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Oh, it's your ring? I didn't know.

lines.speaker: Archpriest of the Unicorn
lines.text: The Justiciar of the Unicorn bestowed it upon me to help with my work within this place.

lines.speaker: Archpriest of the Unicorn
lines.text: I had to work for many hours each day to ensure that everything ran smoothly. As I got older, I found it more and more difficult.

lines.speaker: Archpriest of the Unicorn
lines.text: This ring allowed me to continue my work without feeling the effects that aging was having on my body. I suppose I have no use for it now. I guess you can keep it.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Why did you try to destroy it?

lines.speaker: Archpriest of the Unicorn
lines.text: When I got word that we had to protect this place from the Zamorakian invaders, I was worried that the ring would fall into the wrong hands.

lines.speaker: Archpriest of the Unicorn
lines.text: You don't seem to be too bad though. I hope you put the ring to good use!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Thanks... I think?
